title: FOOD PANTRY - 211info
text: UNIVERSITY PARK ADVENTIST COMMUNITY SERVICES FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a weekly food pantry and monthly free food market to those in need. Individuals are required to bring their own bags or boxes to transport items. 4007 N Alaska Street Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Food Pantry: Wednesday 5pm-7pm, while supplies last Free Food Market: 1st Friday of the month 11am-noon Closed on Christmas Eve and New Years Eve (503) 397-4389 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Pantry Phone (503) 397-4389 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Portland TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus stop nearby at N Alaska Street and Chautauqua Place. Services: Food Pantries Fresh Food If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNIVERSITY PARK ADVENTIST COMMUNITY SERVICES
